title: SDD Document Registry
description: Schema for the SDD document triage registry. Defines document tiers, metadata, and trigger criteria used by triage-documents.sh.

tiers.description: Tier definitions mapping tier names to their metadata and document lists

documents.description: Document definitions keyed by document ID (kebab-case identifier)

propertyNames.description: Document IDs must be lowercase kebab-case

tierDefinition.description: A tier grouping with a description and list of document IDs belonging to it

description.description: Human-readable description of this tier's behavior

documents.description: List of document IDs belonging to this tier

document.description: A single document entry with its metadata, tier, and optional trigger criteria

tier.description: Document tier: core (always generated), standard (generated by default), conditional (trigger-dependent)

template.description: Template file to use for generation (kebab-case with .md extension)

create_tasks_validation.description: Whether this document must be validated during create-tasks: none, required, or recommended

triggers.description: Trigger criteria for conditional and standard documents. Contains keywords for matching and a description of when this document applies.

keywords.description: List of lowercase keywords/phrases for case-insensitive matching against ticket descriptions

description.description: Human-readable description of when this document should be triggered
